cedict_en: seat/base; stand/(bound form) constellation/(archaic) suffix used in a respectful form of address (e.g. 師座|师座[shi1 zuo4])/classifier for large immovable objects such as buildings, mountains, bridges etc
interjection or grunt of agreement or recognition (e.g. yes, it's me!)/to sigh | alas/oh dear
to cherish/to treasure/to take care of/to love and protect
compassion/kindness/care for others/love/CL:片[pian4]/charity (bazaar, golf day etc)/heart (the symbol ♥)
variant of 岸[an4] | bank; shore; beach; coast
to grasp (also fig.)/to seize/to hold/assurance/certainty/sure (of the outcome)
to arrange/to exhibit/to move to and fro/a pendulum | hem (at the bottom of a garment)
teacher in charge of a class
to handle; to transact; to conduct
in the evening/when night falls/towards evening/at night fall/at dusk
stick/club/cudgel/smart/capable/strong/wonderful/classifier for legs of a relay race
